title: PromoCinematic
description: Actually makes minecraft feel like the animated trailers
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uMNp4n4WzFY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Download Barebones Texturepack: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bb

Make minecraft feel exactly like the trailers* with this light visual-only modpack! (compatible with other modpacks)

*modpack recreated from official Minecraft trailers as reference



FEATURES:

Completly server friendly
No gameplay changing features
Runnable on lower-end hardware
Pure client-side visuals & audio improvements
Perfectly compatible with all other mods, modpacks, and resourcepacks!

Included in this pack are:

- Edited config of Complementary Shaders by Emin

- Edited Barebones Texturepack by RoboPantaloons

- Edited Fresh Animations by YoungSoulluoS (THAT WORKS WITH IRIS SODIUM!) 

- AND MORE!

 

 

   You're done. Run Minecraft!

      (Recommended to run Minecraft with more than 4GB allocated ram for the smoothest playable experience but otherwise plays perfectly fine.)

   OPTIONAL: You can add Fancy Cave Animations by following this tutorial: www.youtube.com/watch?v=KNZ7IGI8RYs     

 

ADD-ONS (coming soon):

Camera
Dark Creeper Loading Screen 
screen-revamped
Utility+
3D Crops
